Attorney Ryan Murphy appearing for all defendants in limited scope.
Spanish Court Interpreter Marta Riesen is present to assist all defendants.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of APR-27-2015 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
